description: Single fire-and-forget command that runs the full session learning pipeline:\ \ insights \u2192 reflect \u2192 knowledge \u2192 improve \u2192 action-candidates\ \ \u2192 report. All machines run local Phases 1\u20139 against logs/orchestrator/\ \ and commit derived state. dev-primary additionally runs Phase 10a (cross-machine\ \ compilation) and Phase 10 (report). Safe for cron scheduling. Use when session\ \ ends, nightly cron fires, or you want to harvest learnings from recent sessions.\ \ Replaces running 4 skills manually.\n"
